description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build that runs on every push, pull request, and weekly at 4:00 AM UTC. The workflow has two jobs: test-sdist to run tests from a packaged source on ubuntu-latest with Python 3.7, and test with a matrix strategy to test on multiple OS and Python versions, including ubuntu-latest and macos-latest with Python 2.7, 3.5, 3.6, 3.7, 3.8, 3.9, 3.10, pypy-2.7, and pypy-3.7, and windows-latest with Python 2.7 and 3.10.
